title: Supercharge
description: Supercharge is a lightweight Minecraft modpack focused on maximizing FPS and reducing RAM usage Recharge your minecraft expreince
body:
# 🧠 Requirement  
**Use Modrinth Launcher**

---

## Why Download Supercharge Modpack? ⚡  

### 1. Boost Your FPS with Cutting-Edge Mods 🎮  
The **Supercharge modpack** is built to significantly enhance your FPS, using powerful optimization mods like **Sodium**, **Lithium**, and **ImmediatelyFast**.  
Even in demanding environments like forests or areas filled with mobs, you'll notice fewer lag spikes and smoother gameplay.

---

### 2. Dramatically Reduce RAM Usage 🧠  
With **FerriteCore** optimizing memory management, you’ll experience much lower RAM usage, making Minecraft more stable for long sessions and reducing the chances of crashes, even when using other mods.

---

### 3. Shader-Friendly Without FPS Drops ✨  
Enjoy stunning shaders like **BSL** or **Complementary** without sacrificing performance. Thanks to **Indium** and **Sodium**, your worlds will look amazing while keeping FPS high, allowing for a beautiful and smooth gameplay experience.

---

### 4. Lightweight & Vanilla-Friendly 🏞️  
Supercharge optimizes Minecraft without changing its core experience. The modpack doesn’t alter vanilla gameplay, meaning you get the same Minecraft you love—just with much better performance.

---

### 5. Supports Versions 1.18.2 to the Latest 🔄  
Whether you’re playing on **Minecraft 1.18.2** or the latest version, Supercharge works across all supported versions, making it perfect for players on any version who want to improve their performance.

---

### 6. Perfect for All PCs 💻  
Whether you’re running a **low-end PC** or a **high-end gaming rig**, Supercharge improves Minecraft’s performance by optimizing **RAM usage** and **FPS** for both, ensuring smoother gameplay.

---

### 7. Simple Installation ⚙️  
Installing Supercharge is easy—just drop the modpack into your mods folder and start playing.  
Alternatively, you can use the **Modrinth launcher** for a super simple installation, so you can jump into optimized Minecraft with minimal effort!

---

## What Are You Waiting For? 🚀  
With **FPS boosts**, **RAM optimization**, and **shader support**, Supercharge is the perfect modpack for performance enhancement from **1.18.2 to the latest version**.  

### **Download now to experience Minecraft like never before!**
🛠️ With **Resourcify**, you can download shaders and texture packs directly from the game **without restarting**!

---
